# Tekpair
> Web design, branding, SEO, digital marketing, analytics, and local IT support for growing businesses, creators, and local organizations.
Tekpair is a technology and growth partner for growing businesses, creators, and local organizations in the Capital Region of New York and beyond. We help with anything technical and growth-related: web design and development, branding and design (sourced and coordinated on your behalf), search engine optimization, digital marketing, business analytics and reporting, and local IT support on a monthly retainer. Every engagement starts with a free quote and transparent pricing. To get started, clients email connor@tekpair.com or call (518) 279-6823.

## Core Services

-
[Tekpair - Technology & Growth Partner](https://tekpair.com/): Web design, branding, SEO, marketing, analytics, and local IT support for growing businesses.
-
[Web Design & Development](https://tekpair.com/webdesign/): Custom or platform-based websites, built to be found and fully owned.
-
[Local IT & Support](https://tekpair.com/it-retainers/): Monthly IT retainers — your technical backup for support and emergencies.
